name: Heavenly Chocolate Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup lowfat vanilla yogurt (gelatin-free or lowfat coffee yogurt)
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Coat two cookie sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
Beat the egg, sugars, and oil together in an electric mixer until smooth.
Add the yogurt, vanilla extract, chocolate extract, oats, and cocoa; beat again.
Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; beat until well mixed.
Let the batter sit for about 10 minutes so that the oats can absorb the liquid.
Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter about 2 inches apart onto the cookie sheets and bake for 7 to 8 minutes, or until slightly puffy and no longer look wet.
Cool on wire racks. Repeat until all cookies are baked.
